args.code: (() => { const inputs = [...document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea')].map((i, idx) => ({idx, tag: i.tagName, type: i.type, name: i.name, placeholder: i.placeholder, id: i.id, class: i.className.substring(0,60)})); const buttons = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].map((b, idx) => ({idx, text: b.textContent.trim().substring(0,40)})); return {inputs: inputs.slice(0,15), buttons: buttons.filter(b => b.text.length > 0).slice(0,15)}; })()
